params.name: Heavenfire Sutra
params.description: An ancient and mysterious cultivation technique, initially of low yellow rank, but possessing the unique ability to evolve continuously by devouring different fires. It was accidentally discovered by a powerful cultivator and named the Burning Technique, but its true creator remains unknown. During cultivation, the Burning Technique requires the continuous devouring of different fires to advance, ultimately surpassing the heavenly rank. It was once passed on by a powerful cultivator to his disci …
